message:
feat(plan): E2E rewrite pipeline with fan-in guard (bd-3gqz)

Add end-to-end pipeline (run_e2e_pipeline, run_e2e_pipeline_all) that
validates rewrite → certificate → lab equivalence + trace artifacts for
all 16 fixtures.  Fan-in DAGs skip dynamic lab execution (matching
run_lab_dynamic_equivalence) because aborted tasks may not quiesce
within the step limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
